# UC-15.5.2 · CCTV Camera Offline and Unreachable Status Alerting

## Description

Cameras drop from PoE, cable faults, or IP conflicts; diagnostic streams give faster mean time to restore than hallway rounds.

## Value

Closes coverage blind spots for retail, labs, and perimeter lines.

## Implementation

(1) Poll NVR or VMS API. (2) Deduplicate flapping links. (3) Integrate with access control for maintenance badges.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-1h
| eval cam=coalesce(camera_id, device_id, "")
| eval state=coalesce(connection_state, reachability, "")
| where match(lower(state), "(?i)offline|unreachable|down|lost")
| stats latest(state) as state latest(_time) as seen by cam site
```

## Visualization

Map status; red/yellow matrix.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
